channel.title: Chart Breakers & Star Stories
channel.itunes:author: Family TVR
channel.itunes:summary: Did your favorite artist just break a record or a heart? The charts are screaming, and we have the inside story you won't hear anywhere else.
channel.description: The latest music trends, chart updates, and star stories from Billboard and beyond. Stay updated with the Pop Culture.

item.title: Kany García Breaks Down 5 Essential Tracks From Her New Album ‘Puerta Abierta’
item.description:
[Intro music plays]
Host: Welcome to this week's podcast, where we dive into the latest music releases. Today, we're talking about Kany García's 10th studio album, Puerta Abierta. Released just yesterday, this album is a personal and introspective journey for the singer-songwriter. Let's take a closer look.
[Soft music transitions in]
Host: Kany García decided to revisit her past and return to her mother's home in Morovis, Puerto Rico, to create this album. She wanted to delve into memory and have a sincere dialogue with her inner child. In an interview with Billboard Español, García shared that this process was a challenge, but also a beautiful learning experience.
[Clip of Kany García's music plays]
Host: The album, Puerta Abierta, features 11 tracks, including the previously released singles "Tierra Mía" and "La Mala Era Yo". It's full of reflections on identity, resilience, tenderness, and self-discovery, with rhythms and native instruments from Puerto Rico, the Caribbean, and beyond. The album also features collaborations with legendary artists like Juan Luis Guerra and Nathy Peluso.
[Clip of "La Mala Era Yo" plays]
Host: García notes that the album is not just an ode to her childhood, but a conversation with her inner child. It's autobiographical and explores themes of healing, love, and self-discovery. The artist will also be embarking on an extensive world tour, starting next week in Mexico City, with nearly 40 cities across Latin America and Europe already announced.
[Outro music plays]
Host: That's all for today's podcast. Make sure to check out Kany García's new album, Puerta Abierta, and catch her on tour if you can. Thanks for tuning in, and we'll see you next time.
